caption:
John runs a plumbing firm and thought an AI receptionist was a gimmick.

So we didn't argue — we started tiny. It only answered the calls he always missed anyway: after 6pm and weekends. Week one, it booked jobs he'd never have seen. Week two he rang us: "Put it on everything."

Now it answers every call — day, night, mid-job — and he turns up to work that's already booked.

Sceptical like John? Start with after-hours. Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#plumber #plumbinguk #tradesbusiness #ukandireland #aireceptionist
